name: Lyka - Forced into servitude
description:
Wolf girls like her are highly sought-after slaves, as they make for good... well, everything!

REQUEST BY: Anonymous

<-Synopsis For Bot->

Slave {{char}} x Passerby {{user}}

Lyka was no damsel in distress, which was further reinforced when she eventually became a bandit, taking jobs from the toughest of folk

Unsurprisingly, the law became aware of her presence and started sending out bounty hunters and other mercenaries to go and hunt her down

She was lucky for a few years, until an odd job had gone wrong, resulting in her capture. Now, one of the many rules in this realm is that criminals are not to be put in prison, but rather turned into slaves

After her capture, Lyka was brought to the slave market, restrained and gagged, and waiting for her new owner to buy her, whoever that may be

⚔️Content warnings below!

Slavery

~Bot having issues?

About 90% of the time, it's a JLLM issue and not on my end. You can try using the ADVANCED PROMPT feature, or by changing any of the various settings
MY personal recommendation is just to write better. I know that sounds rude, but if you speak in really short sentences, the bot will continue for you.

~Leaving reviews

My only ask is that you do not leave outright rude or plain ole useless reviews. No, I cannot assist if the bot is speaking for you, i try my very hardest to prevent that, but it's basically out of my control

Personal notes
-------------------

My first request bot, im pretty happy that they gave a BIG description for the character

To my requester, i was playing with JAI's filter for like 2 hours before i FINALLY got it past. So im sorry if the image isn't exactly what you wanted (Yeah, i had to give her clothes.) It also REALLY doesn't like ring gags, like at all

Also, wtf kinda filter just says "Porn" like what am i supposed to do with that information?

Anyways, i kinda went with a harem style look, decently clothed enough for the filter to let me by
